depth Of 200 feet. The ore Will net
sos to the ton in all values.


A deal has been closed whereby
the Horseshoe. one of Trout Lakes
most promising properties, passes
into the hands Of Philadelphia
parties. The property changed hands
at $4,000.


A big strike Of four feet Of ship
ping ore was made on the Lucky Boy
the early part Of the week. The
strike is gray copper and carbonates
and samples tested ran 1890 ounces
silver to the ton.


The Oyster Criterion dam has been
completed and the fiume is now be-
ing constructed. Grading for the
compressor plant and stamp mill is
being pushed ahead rapidly.


At the Eva q contract has been
let for clearing the tram line and
work on the dam was started on
Monday. The grading of the stamp
mill site Is completed, a blacksmith
shop Is already built and lumber is
being delivered on the ground for an
ONCE to be occupied by the superin-
tendent and millwright.


What will likely prove 60 be tel
hurdles Of gold has recently been dis
covered in the No. 2 vein of the Eva
mine. Rudimentary tests of the find
have been made which indicate that
an analysis will prove the existence
Of this valuable mineral in the Eva
